svg.title: War Simulation Four-Tier Architecture
svg.desc: Four-tier architecture diagram showing renderer, orchestration, agents, and kernel tiers with cross-cutting concerns including unclassified banner, per-tenant isolation, capability-gated CZML, and override policy.

g.text: Resium 3D, EXCON consoles, white cell UI, AAR
Multi-tenant control plane, override gateway, turn controller
CrewAI between turns, tools emit PyRapide events
Officer interface tools (Sensor, Effector, Mover, Communicator, Commander)
PyRapide DAG ledger, schema, capability profiles, storage
